retry_reason: Not a wrapper — the skb free is unconditional when skb exists; failure to get skb is handled internally and retry is meaningless.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to process a received event: extract event metadata, retrieve associated skb, adjust it, and forward to firmware event handler. The refcount operation (brcmu_pkt_buf_free_skb) is an incidental cleanup step, not the main goal.
judge.retry_reason: Not a wrapper — the skb free is unconditional when skb exists; failure to get skb is handled internally and retry is meaningless.
